prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document outlines the statutory framework for biodiversity net gain in relation to planning permissions under the Town and Country Planning Act 1990, specifically applicable to England. The regulations and guidance provided are specifically designed and implemented under the legislation that governs planning in England.
